mapper.select: select * from course order by weekday, start_time
mapper.insert: insert into course(course_name, teacher, weekday, start_time, end_time, classroom_id, type) values(#{courseName}, #{teacher}, #{weekday}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{classroomId}, #{type})
mapper.select: select count(*) from course where type = #{type}
select c.* from course c inner join user_course uc on c.course_id = uc.course_id where uc.user_id = #{userId} order by c.weekday, c.start_time

select c.course_id, c.course_name, c.teacher, cl.room_number as classroomName, c.weekday, c.start_time, c.end_time, c.type, uc.note from course c inner join user_course uc on c.course_id = uc.course_id left join classroom cl on c.classroom_id = cl.classroom_id where uc.user_id = #{userId} order by c.weekday, c.start_time

select c.course_id, c.course_name, c.teacher, cl.room_number as classroomName, c.weekday, c.start_time, c.end_time, c.type, uc.note from course c inner join user_course uc on c.course_id = uc.course_id left join classroom cl on c.classroom_id = cl.classroom_id where uc.user_id = #{userId} and c.course_id = #{courseId}
